data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario outcome.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario where settings are copied from one business to another. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete results or traces from this simulation, nor does it confirm whether the expected outcome was achieved. The linked use case and prior steps do not provide sufficient context or data to assess the success or failure of this scenario, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of the simulation results or traces for the persona scenario.
